_comment: Declarative source-of-values template for provisioning a senseflow-eink-node (I2C sensor node).
Sibling of provision_template.json (careflow / Modbus). Same identity + CRM-registration shape;
planeB writes a device-PROFILE blob (prov-profile) instead of Modbus field config (prov-modbus).
Secrets are ${ENV:KEY} references resolved at run time from firmware/.env — never inlined here.

planeA_crm._role: Network/identity — registers the device into ChirpStack AS923 via the SCOMM CRM workflow (shared workflow; only the product identity differs from careflow).

product.name: Senseflow e-ink / I²C ⇄ LoRaWAN AS923 Node
product.description: I²C environmental sensor e-ink display node (BME280/SGP40/SHTC3) over LoRaWAN AS923

hardware.name: ESP32-WROOM-32
hardware._note: Reuses a valid catalog entry; true identity carried in serial/DevEUI.

planeB_nvs._role: Device/runtime — writes the same creds + the selected I²C device-profile blob into node NVS namespace 'prov' (additive; LoRaWAN nonces preserved).

profile._note: The blob is the ADR-006 v2 device-profile (I2C addr + sensor_type + ADR-005 payload map). Source it from the firmware-service GET /v1/profile-blob/<key>?product=senseflow, or the senseflow device-profiles catalog blobHex. Provide the resolved hex via SENSEFLOW_PROFILE_BLOB.
